name: Dante
subtitle: the keeper of the ledger

ultimate_ability.label: The Decree
ultimate_ability.description: Once per game, set down a ruling. Whatever room you're in remembers you said it; the visitors there yield their patience one turn longer.

notes: Dante's hand is the judge's loop — HEAR / RULE / STAMP / WITNESS as starters. Buyable pool is FILINGS (rulings + precedents + signed papers). Second stat is DOUBT (rises bad). Authority replaces Inspiration / Insight / Harvest — the spendable currency that buys rulings. Spec: lore/_TAROT_GAUNTLET_SCENARIOS.md.
